title: EMI Calculator
subtitle: Calculate Your Loan EMI — Equated Monthly Installment
seoDescription: Free online EMI calculator: calculate your monthly loan installment (Equated Monthly Installment) for home loans, car loans, personal loans, and education loans. Enter the loan amount, annual interest rate, and repayment tenure in years or months to instantly see your monthly EMI, total interest payable, and total repayment amount. Features amortization calculation. Perfect for comparing loan offers, planning your monthly budget, and understanding the true cost of borrowing. Mac OS 9 retro style interface. No signup required, works entirely in your browser.
